ns0:entry.ns0:title: RooCodeInc/Roo-Code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RooCodeInc/Roo-Code
Language: typescript
Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-mono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
OmniRoute is an AI gateway for multi-provider LLMs: an OpenAI-compatible endpoint with smart routing, load balancing, retries, and fallbacks. Add policies, rate limits, caching, and observability for reliable, cost-aware inference.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitroomhq/postiz-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitroomhq/postiz-app
Language: typescript
📨 The ultimate agentic social media scheduling tool 🤖

ns0:entry.ns0:title: immich-app/immich
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/immich-app/immich
Language: typescript
High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iptv-org/iptv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iptv-org/iptv
Language: typescript
Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: linshenkx/prompt-optimizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/linshenkx/prompt-optimizer
Language: typescript
An AI prompt optimizer for writing better prompts and getting better AI results.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
Language: typescript
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
